name: crypton-demo-site
description: Minimal demo showing Login with Crypton (OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow)

scripts.build:sdk: tsc --project ../../libs/crypton-sdk/tsconfig.build.json --module CommonJS --moduleResolution node --outDir ../../libs/crypton-sdk/dist/cjs && tsc --project ../../libs/crypton-sdk/tsconfig.build.json --module ESNext --moduleResolution bundler --outDir ../../libs/crypton-sdk/dist/esm
